title: GTA 6 will cost $80, its physical edition will be a code, and it will focus on the single-player campaign
summary: Rockstar reveals prices, the controversial disc-less physical edition, and confirms initial focus on the single-player campaign.

title: Valve admits that Steam Machine was more expensive than expected and details its hardware complications
summary: The company details the reasons for the high price, the delays, and the peculiar decision to launch a limited edition chassis.

title: Marathon introduces an experimental PvE mode called Vault Breaker in its mid-season update
summary: The new single-player and cooperative game mode promises to shake up the game experience before the full launch.

title: Lords of the Fallen 2 delayed to early 2027 to avoid competing with GTA 6
summary: CI Games prefers to take more time to polish the title and avoid market saturation during the 2026 holiday season.

title: Star Fox arrives on Switch 2 with a launch update and positive reviews that praise its essence
summary: The Switch 2 version receives high praise for its frantic action and faithfulness to the series, along with a day-one update.

title: Owlcat Games removes the new launcher for Warhammer 40,000: Rogue Trader after massive fan protest
summary: The player community strongly rejected the new software, forcing developers to withdraw it in less than a day.

title: Blizzard details Diablo 4 Season 14 with changes to Mythic items and an Overwatch crossover
summary: The next season includes controversial changes to legendary loot, an Overwatch crossover, and free trials.

title: EA executives defend generative AI as a true boost to creativity in their studios
summary: Senior executives defend the use of artificial intelligence to accelerate development amidst mass layoffs.

title: Sega surprise-launches Sonic Frontiers: Definitive Edition for Nintendo Switch 2
summary: The enhanced version of Sega's platformer is now available on Nintendo's new console.

title: Star Wars: Galactic Racer showcases its pod racing proposal with a roguelike campaign
summary: Developers detail the customization system and inspiration from classic arcade racing games.

title: Pokémon TCG Pocket's 'Everyday Wonders' expansion launches June 29 with a Jirachi event
summary: The popular card application receives new content and limited-time events to obtain one of the most beloved creatures.

title: A harsh wave of layoffs and closures hits the video game industry in the middle of summer
summary: Independent studios shut their doors and major publishers carry out staff cuts in a difficult summer for the industry.

title: Netflix and WIT Studio finally release the trailer for the One Piece remake with a confirmed release date
summary: The new preview shows the art style and confirms the release window for the long-awaited reimagining of the anime.

title: Hideo Kojima reveals that no publisher wanted to support OD, thinking it was a crazy idea
summary: The Japanese creator claims that major companies rejected his ambitious horror project for being too risky.

title: A power struggle erupts between FromSoftware owners and activist shareholders over Elden Ring profits
summary: FromSoftware's parent company faces a tense power struggle over the management of the enormous profits from the successful RPG.

title: Dave Filoni, creator of Clone Wars, develops an animated series of Conan the Barbarian for Prime Video
summary: The veteran animation showrunner will try his hand at the sword and sorcery genre for the streaming platform.

title: Final Fantasy 14 improves its most annoying raid and FF7 Rebirth defends the authenticity of its queer characters
summary: The Japanese company shares its reflections on authentic representation and quality-of-life improvements in its MMO.

title: Development of 007 First Light for Nintendo Switch 2 is progressing well and is close to completion
summary: The famous secret agent's first-person shooter is nearing its release on Nintendo's hybrid console.

title: The original Tekken will come to Nintendo Switch 2 on June 25 as part of Arcade Archives 2
summary: The original entry in the legendary fighting series will arrive on the platform as part of its new collection of classics.

title: Sonic Racing CrossWorlds adds Classic Sonic, Axel, and Amigo as free characters
summary: The online racing game is updated with new classic racers at no additional cost for players.
